title: Publications | Ministry of Health NZ
content:
## Publications Ngā whakaputanga kōrero
- Children’s Exposure to Gambling and Gambling Marketing Publication date: 19 December 2025 Kids Online Aotearoa Gambling and High Stakes research investigated the extent and nature of children's exposure to gambling activities and marketing, particularly online. It also gathered the views of children and key stakeholders on this exposure, effectiveness of current public health measures, and what new measures are required to better protect children. Publication Gambling harm Gambling research

## Children’s Exposure to Gambling and Gambling Marketing
Kids Online Aotearoa Gambling and High Stakes research investigated the extent and nature of children's exposure to gambling activities and marketing, particularly online. It also gathered the views of children and key stakeholders on this exposure, effectiveness of current public health measures, and what new measures are required to better protect children.
- Preliminary Investigation of Patterns of Online Gambling and F2P Gaming Engagement and Harm in New Zealand Publication date: 19 December 2025 This research explores the sociodemographic and behavioural characteristics of monetary engagement in Free-to Play gaming and how this engagement relates to gambling risk and harm. Publication Gambling harm Gambling research

## Preliminary Investigation of Patterns of Online Gambling and F2P Gaming Engagement and Harm in New Zealand
This research explores the sociodemographic and behavioural characteristics of monetary engagement in Free-to Play gaming and how this engagement relates to gambling risk and harm.
- Measuring the Gambling-Related Financial Harms Experienced by Whānau and Affected Others and Identifying Mitigating Practices Publication date: 19 December 2025 This research strengthens understanding of the gambling-related financial harms experienced by affected others in New Zealand, including the extent of these harms, the differences across gender and ethnicity, and the role of financial products and related policies. Publication Gambling harm Gambling research

## Measuring the Gambling-Related Financial Harms Experienced by Whānau and Affected Others and Identifying Mitigating Practices
This research strengthens understanding of the gambling-related financial harms experienced by affected others in New Zealand, including the extent of these harms, the differences across gender and ethnicity, and the role of financial products and related policies.
- New Zealand Gambling Survey 2023/24: Methodology report Publication date: 19 December 2025 Information about the methodology and questionnaire of the New Zealand Gambling Survey 2023/24. Publication Gambling research

## New Zealand Gambling Survey 2023/24: Methodology report
Information about the methodology and questionnaire of the New Zealand Gambling Survey 2023/24.
- Compliance Guide for Portable Nuclear Gauges: ORS G12A Publication date: 19 December 2025 The Compliance Guide for Portable Nuclear Gauges ORS G12A is a practical guide to implement radiation safety measures under the Code of Practice for Sealed Radioactive Material in the civil engineering and horticulture industries where portable nuclear gauges are used. Publication Radiation safety

## Compliance Guide for Portable Nuclear Gauges: ORS G12A
The Compliance Guide for Portable Nuclear Gauges ORS G12A is a practical guide to implement radiation safety measures under the Code of Practice for Sealed Radioactive Material in the civil engineering and horticulture industries where portable nuclear gauges are used.
- Suicide Prevention Action Plan 2025–29: Consultation analysis and insights Publication date: 16 December 2025 This publication presents Shea, Pita and Associates, and Synergia’s analysis of feedback and insights gathered through consultation on the Draft Suicide Prevention Action Plan for 2025–2029 consultation document. Publication Suicide Mental health

## Suicide Prevention Action Plan 2025–29: Consultation analysis and insights
This publication presents Shea, Pita and Associates, and Synergia’s analysis of feedback and insights gathered through consultation on the Draft Suicide Prevention Action Plan for 2025–2029 consultation document.
- Māori Lived Experience Suicide Prevention Action Plan Consultation 2024 Publication date: 16 December 2025 This publication presents Te Kete Pounamu ’s analysis of key discussions, insights, and recommendations gathered through consultation with Māori individuals with lived and living experience on the Draft Suicide Prevention Action Plan for 2025–2029 consultation document. Publication Mental health Suicide Māori health

## Māori Lived Experience Suicide Prevention Action Plan Consultation 2024
This publication presents Te Kete Pounamu ’s analysis of key discussions, insights, and recommendations gathered through consultation with Māori individuals with lived and living experience on the Draft Suicide Prevention Action Plan for 2025–2029 consultation document.
- Draft Suicide Prevention Action Plan 2024–2029: Lived Experience Knowledge Publication date: 16 December 2025 This publication presents Changing Minds’ analysis of lived experience expertise, insights and experiences gathered through consultation with people with lived experience of mental distress and/or addiction on the Draft Suicide Prevention Action Plan for 2025–2029 consultation document. Publication Mental health Suicide

## Draft Suicide Prevention Action Plan 2024–2029: Lived Experience Knowledge
This publication presents Changing Minds’ analysis of lived experience expertise, insights and experiences gathered through consultation with people with lived experience of mental distress and/or addiction on the Draft Suicide Prevention Action Plan for 2025–2029 consultation document.
- Māori Years of Life Lost: Estimates from the Global Burden of Disease Study, 2021 Publication date: 12 December 2025 This report presents findings from the Global Burden of Disease Study 2021, focusing on the years of life lost for Māori in Aotearoa New Zealand. It highlights the leading causes of premature death for Māori, and significant health disparities between the Māori and non-Māori populations. Publication Māori health Statistics

## Māori Years of Life Lost: Estimates from the Global Burden of Disease Study, 2021
This report presents findings from the Global Burden of Disease Study 2021, focusing on the years of life lost for Māori in Aotearoa New Zealand. It highlights the leading causes of premature death for Māori, and significant health disparities between the Māori and non-Māori populations.
- Abortion Services Aotearoa New Zealand: Annual Report 2025 Publication date: 10 December 2025 The Abortion Services Aotearoa New Zealand Annual Report 2025 provides a snapshot of abortion services for the 2024 calendar year. Publication Abortion Statistics Sexual & reproductive health

## Abortion Services Aotearoa New Zealand: Annual Report 2025
The Abortion Services Aotearoa New Zealand Annual Report 2025 provides a snapshot of abortion services for the 2024 calendar year.
- Sexual & reproductive health
- Racial Discrimination 2023/24: New Zealand Health Survey Publication date: 9 December 2025 This page summarises information on adults’ self-reported experiences of racial discrimination in New Zealand. Publication Statistics Inequalities Asian health Māori health Pacific health

## Racial Discrimination 2023/24: New Zealand Health Survey
This page summarises information on adults’ self-reported experiences of racial discrimination in New Zealand.
- Memorandum of Understanding between the Ministry of Health and Health New Zealand for Alcohol Levy funding Publication date: 9 December 2025 The Ministry of Health and Health New Zealand have signed a Memorandum of Understanding to strengthen efforts to reduce alcohol-related harm across New Zealand. Publication Alcohol Health system

## Memorandum of Understanding between the Ministry of Health and Health New Zealand for Alcohol Levy funding
The Ministry of Health and Health New Zealand have signed a Memorandum of Understanding to strengthen efforts to reduce alcohol-related harm across New Zealand.
- HIV Monitoring Report – Measuring progress against the National HIV Action Plan for Aotearoa New Zealand 2023–2030 Publication date: 1 December 2025 The HIV Monitoring Report is an annual assessment under the HIV Monitoring Plan: Measuring progress against the National HIV Action Plan for Aotearoa New Zealand 2023–2030. Publication Diseases & conditions Public health

## HIV Monitoring Report – Measuring progress against the National HIV Action Plan for Aotearoa New Zealand 2023–2030
The HIV Monitoring Report is an annual assessment under the HIV Monitoring Plan: Measuring progress against the National HIV Action Plan for Aotearoa New Zealand 2023–2030.
- Diseases & conditions
- Notifiable Products Annual Sales Return 2025: User guide Publication date: 1 December 2025 The 2025 annual sales return user guide is a step-by-step guide for how to submit your annual sales return for each license type. Publication Vaping Public health

## Notifiable Products Annual Sales Return 2025: User guide
The 2025 annual sales return user guide is a step-by-step guide for how to submit your annual sales return for each license type.
- Drug Checking Service Provider Licensing Handbook Publication date: 20 November 2025 The Drug Checking Service Provider Licensing Handbook supports potential and current drug checking providers with understanding the legislation and the regulations for drug checking and contains information on how to apply for a new or renewed licence. Publication Drugs

## Drug Checking Service Provider Licensing Handbook
The Drug Checking Service Provider Licensing Handbook supports potential and current drug checking providers with understanding the legislation and the regulations for drug checking and contains information on how to apply for a new or renewed licence.
